name: POSTGRES | Install v1
description: Survey vars for deploy_postgres.yml. All fields optional -- defaults apply.

spec.question_description: Port PostgreSQL will listen on. Must not conflict with other services. Default 15432 (non-standard, avoids clash with system PostgreSQL on 5432).
postgresql.conf max_connections. Increase if many concurrent clients expected.
postgresql.conf shared_buffers. Recommended: 25% of RAM. Examples: 512MB, 2GB.
postgresql.conf work_mem per sort/hash operation. Examples: 16MB, 64MB.
Authentication method for new passwords. scram-sha-256 recommended (PostgreSQL 10+). Use md5 only for legacy client compatibility.
CIDR to allow remote TCP connections in pg_hba.conf (e.g. 10.0.1.0/24 or 192.168.1.50/32). Leave blank to allow local connections only (127.0.0.1). Ops team adds user-specific entries later.
true = create an initial application database after install.
Name of the initial database to create. Only used when 'Create initial database' is true.
true = run postgres_manage_users role after install (requires pg_username and related vars).
true = run db_patches role to discover available updates (no apply).
